product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Peri Peri
review_title: Finally a healthy snack that actually tastes good!
review_body: I have been searching for a snack that satisfies my cravings without the guilt and CrunchMate has nailed it. The peri peri flavor is bold and perfectly spiced. The millet base gives it a unique earthy crunch that regular potato chips simply cannot replicate. My whole family is hooked.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Peri Peri
review_title: Packet arrived completely crushed and stale
review_body: The chips were broken into tiny crumbs when the packet arrived. Clearly the packaging cannot withstand courier handling. The foil bag had a small puncture which made the chips go completely stale and soft. Returned immediately.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Himalayan Salt
review_title: The best guilt-free snack for weight-conscious people
review_body: As someone tracking my macros this is a blessing. High millet content means lower glycaemic index and the Himalayan salt variant is perfectly subtle. I eat these during work calls without feeling bloated afterward. Genuinely impressive nutrition profile.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Peri Peri
review_title: Taste is great but quantity is disappointing
review_body: The flavour is absolutely on point and the crunch is satisfying. But the 60g packet is barely enough for one person and is priced at 80 rupees. At this rate it is an expensive snacking habit. Wish they offered a family-size 200g pack.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Cheese & Herbs
review_title: Cannot find these in local stores — online only!
review_body: The cheese and herbs variant is outstanding. Real cheese powder with no artificial aftertaste. I discovered CrunchMate during a health fair and ordered bulk online. The crunch stays intact even after opening for 2 days. Top quality product.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Peri Peri
review_title: Way too spicy — not for everyone
review_body: The peri peri spice level is extreme. I ordered for my kids and they could not eat it at all. My eyes were watering and I kept coughing. The label says medium spice but this is at least very hot. The brand must relabel honestly.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Himalayan Salt
review_title: Crunch is incredibly satisfying — unlike any other millet chip
review_body: The texture is what sets CrunchMate apart. Most millet snacks are dense and chewy but these are light airy and deliver a proper satisfying crunch. The Himalayan salt gives a clean finish without any artificial aftertaste. Genuinely world-class snack.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Cheese & Herbs
review_title: Lost crunch after one day of opening
review_body: Once the packet is opened the chips lose their crunchiness within 24 hours even when stored in an airtight container. The reseal zip on the bag does not close properly. For a premium product the packaging quality must be improved significantly.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Tangy Tomato
review_title: Health claims are actually verified and real!
review_body: Unlike many so-called healthy snacks these chips genuinely have high fibre content and no refined flour. I checked with my nutritionist and she confirmed the ingredient list is clean. Gluten-free and no palm oil. The tangy tomato flavour is addictive.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Peri Peri
review_title: Great taste but burns your lips after 10 chips
review_body: The peri peri flavour is fantastic for the first few chips but the cumulative heat builds up quickly. After about 10 chips my lips were burning. Need to have water nearby. Would love a mild version of this same flavour profile.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Himalayan Salt
review_title: Shared with my yoga class — everyone ordered immediately
review_body: I brought one pack to my yoga class and within a week everyone in the class had ordered their own. The clean ingredient list aligned perfectly with my health-conscious community. No additives no preservatives and genuinely tasty.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Cheese & Herbs
review_title: Cheese flavour is inconsistent across bags
review_body: Sometimes the cheese flavour is rich and intense and sometimes it is barely noticeable. Three consecutive purchases showed very different flavour intensity. The manufacturing quality control needs attention. The crunch is always good though.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Tangy Tomato
review_title: Finally replaced my evening Lay's habit!
review_body: I used to eat a packet of Lay's every evening without thinking. After switching to CrunchMate tangy tomato I have better energy levels no post-snack bloating and the taste is honestly more interesting. Proud of this switch.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Himalayan Salt
review_title: Not actually gluten-free — packaging is misleading
review_body: The packaging prominently says gluten-free but I had a mild reaction. When I emailed the brand they admitted the product is made on shared equipment with wheat-containing products. This is completely unacceptable for people with celiac disease. Very misleading labelling.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Peri Peri
review_title: Addictive in the best possible way
review_body: I have been ordering every week for 3 months. The peri peri is bold and complex — I can taste individual spice layers. My coworkers steal them from my desk daily. The millet gives a fullness that potato chips never do.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Cheese & Herbs
review_title: Great for office snacking — low odor and light
review_body: Perfect office snack. No strong smell that disturbs colleagues and the portion is light enough to not feel heavy during work hours. Flavour is pleasant and the crunch is not too loud for open-plan offices. Will continue buying.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Tangy Tomato
review_title: Artificial tangy flavour ruins an otherwise good product
review_body: The tangy tomato starts well but the aftertaste is distinctly artificial — it lingers for 20 minutes and has a chemical quality to it. The base chip and crunch are genuinely excellent. If they fixed the flavouring chemistry this product would be a 5 star.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Himalayan Salt
review_title: My diabetic father can finally enjoy snacks guilt-free
review_body: My father is Type 2 diabetic and has been restricted from all snacks for years. His doctor approved these chips due to the low GI millet base and absence of refined flour. He absolutely loves the Himalayan salt variant. This product genuinely improves quality of life.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Peri Peri
review_title: Inconsistent spice levels across batches
review_body: The first two orders of peri peri were at a comfortable heat level. The third order from a different batch was significantly hotter. Batch inconsistency in spice application is a real quality control problem for a brand at this price point.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Cheese & Herbs
review_title: Packaging design is premium — great gifting option
review_body: The packaging looks and feels genuinely premium. The gold foil design with the millet branding is beautiful. I gifted a set of four variants to my sister for Diwali and she loved the presentation as much as the chips. Very giftable product.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Tangy Tomato
review_title: Three out of five packets were stale on arrival
review_body: Ordered a pack of five and three arrived clearly stale with soft soggy chips. The best-before date was months away but the packaging had clearly been compromised. The foil seals on all three were slightly open. Poor quality control on the packing line.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Himalayan Salt
review_title: Best millet snack but wish it was more widely available offline
review_body: Genuinely the best millet chip I have tried. The crunch the ingredients and the taste are all excellent. My only feedback is it is only available online and delivery takes 4-5 days. A retail presence in modern trade stores would make this a daily buy.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Peri Peri
review_title: Converted my entire hostel floor to millet chips!
review_body: Started ordering for myself and now 12 people on my college hostel floor are regular CrunchMate customers. The peri peri is our go-to study snack. It satisfies midnight hunger without making us feel sluggish. Great discovery.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Cheese & Herbs
review_title: Overpriced compared to similar healthy snack brands
review_body: MunchRight and Slurrp Farm offer similar millet-based snacks at 30 to 40 percent lower price with comparable taste. CrunchMate feels overpriced unless they can demonstrate a meaningful health advantage. The taste is good but not worth the premium currently.

product_name: CrunchMate Premium Millet Chips - Tangy Tomato
review_title: The crunch never gets old — truly exceptional texture
review_body: Three months in and I am still as excited to open a CrunchMate packet as I was on day one. The texture engineers at this company have clearly done something special. Every chip is uniformly crunchy with no soft or broken pieces. World-class manufacturing.
